pages.title: 9mm Rounds
pages.text: The installed Weapon Printer recipe converts 1 Copper Ingot and 1 Gunpowder into 19 rounds. That output is two rounds more than a full Glock magazine.

pages.title: Reload Discipline
pages.text: Reload behind cover and count magazines by what you actually carry, not by what the printer produces. The starter stack is 17 rounds; each printer job produces 19.$(br2)

pages.title: Weapon Components
pages.text: These standard recipes render live and support the wider firearm manufacturing chain.

pages.title: Gunmetal
pages.text: Gunmetal is a core material for your firearm arsenal. Check JEI for the live smelting and blasting routes in the installed content pack.
